description: Unleash the power of savings with our modern, minimalistic email template, specially designed for Black Friday gym deals. Ideal for fitness centers and sports equipment retailers, this template features a sleek black design, accentuated with mint highlights. Promote your Black Friday flash sale on gym gear, boxing gloves, gym supplements, and more. It's also perfect for advertising discounted gym classes, including spin and boxing. The fresh, modern design captures the essence of the Fall season while effectively promoting your Black Friday discounts. Make your fitness deals stand out this shopping season with our uniquely designed template.
short_description: Discover savings with our modern Black Friday gym deals email template. Ideal for fitness centers and sports retailers, promote your flash sale on gym gear, classes, and supplements. Stand out this shopping season with our sleek, minimalistic design.

designer.description:
Graphic designer with a keen interest in typography, layout and illustration. 
Currently exploring & experimenting with all things UI :))
